info.title: Community Feed API
info.description:
Community-governed Bluesky feed generator where subscribers democratically vote on ranking algorithm weights. Built on AT Protocol.

## Authentication
- **Governance endpoints** require a session cookie or bearer token from `POST /api/governance/auth/login`.
- **Admin endpoints** additionally require the caller's DID to be in the `BOT_ADMIN_DIDS` allowlist.
- **Feed endpoints** are public (called by the Bluesky app). Auth is optional for subscriber tracking.
- **Transparency endpoints** are public and unauthenticated.

get.description: Returns the DID and feed URIs for this generator. Called by Bluesky for feed discovery.

did.description: Service DID for this feed generator

feeds.description: List of feeds served by this generator

get.description: Returns the DID document for did:web resolution. Used as a fallback — production uses did:plc.
Returns a list of post URIs for the community-governed feed. Called by the Bluesky app. Uses snapshot-based cursors for stable pagination (5-minute TTL).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page (absent on last page)

post.description: Receives user interaction signals (requestMore, requestLess, etc.) from Bluesky clients. Requires a valid JWT in the Authorization header. Stored for analytics and scoring feedback.

Authenticate using a Bluesky handle and app password. Returns a session cookie (HttpOnly) and bearer token. Use the cookie for browser-based governance actions, or the bearer token for CLI/MCP clients.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's session info. Requires a valid session cookie or bearer token.

post.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the session cookie.

Cast or update your vote for the current epoch. You can vote on algorithm weights, content keywords, topic weights, or any combination. Weights must sum to 1.0. Requires authentication and active subscription.

epoch_id.description: Epoch the vote was recorded for

is_update.description: True if this updated an existing vote

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's vote for the current active epoch, including weights, keywords, and topic weights.

vote.description: Current weight votes (null if no vote cast)

voted_at.description: When the vote was last cast or updated

get.description: Returns all active topics from the topic catalog with their current community-voted weights. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

voteCount.description: Number of topic weight voters this epoch

get.description: Returns the active epoch's governance weights, vote count, and metadata.

vote_count.description: Number of votes in this epoch

get.description: Returns all epochs with their weights, ordered newest first. Useful for timeline visualization of governance changes.
Compare weights between two epochs, showing the difference for each component.
Returns a paginated list of governance epochs with weights, vote counts, and content rules. Optionally filter by status.
Returns the current active or voting epoch with weights, vote/subscriber counts, voting schedule, and content rules.
Returns full details for a specific epoch including weights, vote statistics (averages and ranges), and content rules.

vote_statistics.description: Aggregate vote statistics (null if no votes)

get.description: Returns Polis conversation info if configured. Currently a placeholder for future deliberation integration.
Returns the current status of the Polis integration roadmap and planned features.
Returns the current epoch's content rules (active keywords) and per-keyword vote statistics. Keywords require 30% voter support to become active.

include_keyword_votes.description: Keyword → vote count map for include keywords

exclude_keyword_votes.description: Keyword → vote count map for exclude keywords

total_voters.description: Number of voters who submitted keyword votes

threshold.description: Minimum votes required for keyword activation

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's current research consent status. Research consent is separate from TOS — declining does not restrict governance access.

post.description: Record or update the user's research consent decision. Consent changes are logged to the audit trail.

get.description: Returns a full breakdown of why a post is ranked where it is: all 5 component scores (raw, weight, weighted), current rank, and a counterfactual showing what rank it would have with pure engagement sorting.

components.description: All 5 scoring components with raw, weight, and weighted values

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics for the current feed including epoch weights, scoring metrics (posts scored, unique authors, avg/median bridging), governance info, and optional Gini coefficient.

metrics.description: Diversity and comparison metrics (available after first scoring run)

get.description: "What if the weights were different?" Recalculates rankings using stored raw scores with alternate weights. Weights must sum to 1.0.

rank_delta.description: Positive = moved up with alternate weights

get.description: Returns a paginated, append-only audit log of all governance actions. Vote details are redacted to preserve voter privacy (shows counts, not specific votes).
Returns the current Terms of Service document in Markdown format with version info.
Returns the current Privacy Policy document in Markdown format with version info.
Returns a redacted health status (ok or degraded). Does not expose component details.
Returns 200 if the process is running. Used by Kubernetes liveness probes.
Returns 200 if database and Redis are healthy. Used by Kubernetes readiness probes.
